text.title: Fine-tune cost vs prompt decision — decision tree

decision-tree.root-question: Baseline eval exists AND production constraint declared AND owner named?

branch.when: baseline_eval == null OR production_constraint == false OR owner == null
baseline_eval != null AND production_constraint == true AND owner != null
branch.question: strong_signals.length >= 2 AND break_even_months <= 12 AND fine_tune_lift >= lift_bar?

branch.when: strong_signals_count >= 2 AND break_even_months <= 12 AND fine_tune_lift >= lift_bar
strong_signals_count < 2 OR break_even_months > 12 OR fine_tune_lift < lift_bar
branch.question: Prompt-improve OR RAG OR routing path closes the gap?

example.trace: baseline 0.78, lift_bar 0.03, ft_lift 0.02, strong_signals 1 -> alternative path -> prompt+route clears bar -> r3 (prompt-improve)
